tasks.label: scp-to-remote
tasks.command: ssh pavel@192.168.0.2 'killall -q -9 mpu6050; rm -f /tmp/mpu6050' && scp build/mpu6050 pavel@192.168.0.2:/tmp

tasks.label: run-remote-gdbserver
tasks.command: ssh pavel@192.168.0.2 'killall -q -9 gdbserver mpu6050; nohup gdbserver :9091 /tmp/mpu6050 > /dev/null 2>&1 &'
